message:
fix: add draggable resize handle to AI missions sidebar (#3724)

* fix: add draggable resize handle to AI missions sidebar

Closes #3715

The mission sidebar had a fixed 680px width with no way to resize it.
This adds a draggable resize handle on the left edge of the panel that
lets users adjust the width between 380px and 1200px (capped at 85% of
viewport). The chosen width persists in localStorage across sessions.
The CSS transition is disabled during active drag for smooth resizing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: apply review feedback — clamp width, safe localStorage persist, accessible resize handle
